## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Validation

List the commands and manual checks performed.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally.
- [ ] No real private data appears in code, examples, issues, screenshots, logs, or fixtures.
- [ ] New or changed samples are synthetic P0 material only.
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are included.
- [ ] No source-file deletion, move, rename, overwrite, or mutation behavior was added.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] The privacy model and local-only boundary remain respected.
